name: Summer Triple Mahjong
description: Enjoy a relaxing summer puzzle adventure in Summer Triple Mahjong!Match and collect 3 identical tiles that are free on the left or right side. Clear all the tiles before time runs out to complete the level and unlock new challenges. If you get stuck, use the Hint feature to help you find matches. If the time runs out, you can watch a reward ad to pause the timer and keep playing.
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to select and collect 3 matching tiles that are free on the left or right side Clear all tiles before the timer ends to complete the level
